languages.text: А можно поменять на такую же но розовую?

traits.locale_text: А можно поменять на такую же но розовую?

languages.text: "Моя нога огнем горит — хороша норма! Подайте мне жалобный формуляр!"

traits.locale_text: "Моя нога огнем горит — хороша норма! Подайте мне жалобный формуляр!"

languages.text: "My leg feels like it's on fire! How is that normal? Give me the complaint form!"
languages.original_text: "Моя нога огнем горит — хороша норма! Подайте мне жалобный формуляр!"

traits.locale_text: "My leg feels like it's on fire! How is that normal? Give me the complaint form!"
"My leg feels like it's on fire! How is that normal? Give me the complaint form!"
"My leg feels like it's on fire! How is that normal? Give me the complaint form!"
"My leg feels like it's on fire! How is that normal? Give me the complaint form!"

languages.text: 「じゃあ、この色はどう説明するの？もっと濃い色にしたかったのに！」
languages.original_text: "Then how do you explain the colour? I wanted it darker!"

languages.text: "Bacağım yanıyor gibi hissediyorum! Bu nasıl normal olabilir? Bana şikâyet formunu verin!"
languages.original_text: "My leg feels like it's on fire! How is that normal? Give me the complaint form!"

traits.locale_text: "Bacağım yanıyor gibi hissediyorum! Bu nasıl normal olabilir? Bana şikâyet formunu verin!"

languages.text: “我的腿像是在燃烧！这怎么能叫正常？把投诉表给我！”
languages.original_text: "My leg feels like it's on fire! How is that normal? Give me the complaint form!"

traits.locale_text: “我的腿像是在燃烧！这怎么能叫正常？把投诉表给我！”

languages.text: "Meine Beine fühlen sich an, als würden sie brennen! Wie kann das normal sein? Wo kann ich mich hier beschweren?"
languages.original_text: "My leg feels like it's on fire! How is that normal? Give me the complaint form!"

traits.locale_text: "Meine Beine fühlen sich an, als würden sie brennen! Wie kann das normal sein? Wo kann ich mich hier beschweren?"

languages.text: « J'ai l'impression d'avoir les jambes en feu ! Ce n'est pas normal ! Donnez-moi le formulaire de réclamation ! »
languages.original_text: "My leg feels like it's on fire! How is that normal? Give me the complaint form!"

traits.locale_text: « J'ai l'impression d'avoir les jambes en feu ! Ce n'est pas normal ! Donnez-moi le formulaire de réclamation ! »

languages.text: «¡Me arde la pierna! ¿Y dice que esto es normal? ¡Exijo la hoja de reclamaciones!».
languages.original_text: "My leg feels like it's on fire! How is that normal? Give me the complaint form!"

traits.locale_text: «¡Me arde la pierna! ¿Y dice que esto es normal? ¡Exijo la hoja de reclamaciones!».
